title: EUR_DATA: Integrating EU studies and Data Analytics using a Project-based Learning Approach
description: Open datasets, reproducible code, and educational resources on European political institutions, produced by the EUR_DATA Erasmus+ Jean Monnet Module (grant 101127178). The first release covers the formation of the 2024-2029 European Commission: the College of Commissioners, mission-letter commitments, confirmation hearings, the investiture vote, the 2025 Commission Work Programme, and a formation timeline.
